programmes.show_description: There's a huge and very messy back cyst for Dr Adil Sheraz, Dr Toby Nelson treats a cheeky patient, and Dr Dev Shah meets a roofer with nine lives. (Ep5)
...Pay Up! Lewis has a challenging enforcement in the north of England, removing a former premier league footballer's one-time agent from a house the footballer didn't know he owned.
Documentary series. Landlords fall foul of two young tenants who are using their rental property as a film set. But the tenants have stopped paying the rent and won't leave.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Five-year-old Saira has a severe peanut allergy, and was spotted eating something off the floor at nursery.
Dr Toby treats one of the largest lipomas the clinic has seen; Dr Natalia deals with a supersized warty lesion; Dr Emma sorts out a cyst that patient Barry's wife has enjoyed squeezing.
Challengers 'The Crabapples', a family team from St Albans, try to defeat the Eggheads to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep5)
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
We meet up again with Cockney cheesemongers Deb and Dave, who bring a taste of Britain to their customers on the Costa Blanca.
We meet up with Tony and Claire as they enjoy a carefree day in the Spanish sun. With gold and some lunch at the 19th hole, threatened only by Tony's proud boasting.
In West Orchards, Coventry, there's a stand-off between guards and a gang in a premium store. In London, CCTV is needed when a woman is suspected of being on the pinch. (Ep15)
Over a Bank Holiday, near Scarborough, a high-speed pursuit ensues after a driver fails to stop. In the Dales, an operation is underway to crack down on motorists flouting the law.
With North Yorkshire's roads a big draw for bikers, policing them is a top priority. A 70-year-old biker crashes down an embankment but is spared serious injury thanks to a gadget.
Officers give high-speed pursuit to a van with cloned plates which smashes through traffic near Leeds, and on the A1 a driver claims a mechanical fault caused him to crash.
The Lincolnshire law enforcers intercept an illegal car operation and deal with a trucker with a violent temper, an unexploded bomb and some very cute calves.
A driver has fled the scene of a horrific crash and Dan catches a pair of green-fingered lads at Spalding's annual flower show.
The interceptors chase a van thief, Dan joins a major manhunt, and Jon wades into a late-night assault involving a pair of TV legends.
A tourist's repeat claim for lost headphones is exposed. Dashcam footage catches a crash-for-cash gang, while a man lies about stolen heirlooms.
Lacey receives a mysterious delivery. Alf attempts to mediate. Jo and Tane finally talk.
Is Leah saying goodbye forever? Levi and Mackenzie stick their noses in. Tane and Jo need some time alone.
The doctors treat a patient drinking too much in an effort to blot out depression, a heavy drinker with a damaged liver and an unusual case of 'swimmer's itch'.
It's all change at Barnsley casualty as a new system is introduced; Sister Benita takes on the role of team leader for the first time; the staff treats critical patients.
When 22-year-old Ben arrives after crashing his motorbike at speed, trauma team leader Richard fears his patient may have suffered a life changing spinal cord injury.
The team deal with an injured man under the influence of drugs, a one-year-old baby in the grip of life-threatening seizures, and a fire in a garage containing hazardous chemicals.
Dr Natalia Spierings gets herself a wedding invitation after helping newly-engaged Carly with a 'secret on her back'. Dr Adil Sheraz finds a suspicious lesion on a mole patient.
Documentary series. Landlords fall foul of two young tenants who are using their rental property as a film set. Eviction lawyer Chris receives a shock at an abandoned printworks.
Documentary series. After offering a former tenant the use of a spare room until she gets back on her feet, a landlord then struggles to evict her, and her partner.
Documentary series. A doctor needs to evict a defaulting tenant from his old family home. Over 30 men found living in an unsafe house refuse to name the landlord.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Candid interviews with the staff reveal first-hand that medical professionals need healthcare too.
Challengers 'The Upper Eden Chancers' take on the mighty Eggheads, aiming to win the rolling prize fund. (Ep6)

Cash doubles down on his lie. Sonny snaps at Dana. Kerrie resorts to some of her old tricks.
Harper shuts Kerrie out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change.
Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?
Lacey receives a mysterious delivery. Alf attempts to mediate. Jo and Tane finally talk.
In Newton Abbot, a pensioner is shopping when a woman takes an envelope of money from her. In Coventry, Mal spots a suspected drug user who already has a lifetime ban. (Ep11)
At West Orchards, Paige receives an SOS from a new store that a dastardly duo are back. And Farrah is on the case of a pair who work together to hit a small convenience store. (Ep12)
Documentary series. When they respond to an alarm at a laundrette, firefighters discover several people living illegally on the premises.
Documentary series. A furious landlord discovers his tenant has been sub-letting his London flat, and squatters with a baby are given two weeks to find somewhere new to live.
Documentary series. Documentary series. Anthony comes to the aid of Max, a rather rotund Rottweiler who has been cooped up indoors by owners who are banned from keeping animals.
Documentary series. Fabielli and her family have been forced into one room due to leaks in the roof, but the landlord refuses to make any repairs.
A serial scammer attempts to make identical travel insurance claims and a caravan owner claims for a theft that never happened.
Whimsical drama starring Renee Zellweger and Ewan McGregor, following the life of early 20th-century children's author Beatrix Potter, creator of Peter Rabbit. (2006)
A daily round-up of showbiz news and gossip from around the world, focusing on celebrities, movies, music and entertainment.

A haunting ghost story starring Maggie Smith and Timothy Spall. When a 13-year-old finds he can travel back in time, he begins an adventure that unlocks family secrets. (2009)

Starring Judi Dench, Dev Patel and Maggie Smith. As the Best Exotic Marigold Hotel only has a single remaining vacancy, Sonny pursues his expansionist dream of opening a second hotel. (2015)
